body.title: [triage] Audit skills harmony: repo vs ~/.claude/skills/
body.intention: I intend that the team has clarity on the canonical skills location and the maintenance model before Friday's discussion.
body.description:
**Problem:** Skills exist in two locations: `~/.claude/skills/` (local user config) and `skills/` (repo root). Memory rules say repo is canonical (portable, travels with UU), but both locations have divergences — local has skills not in repo (`ADCHelp`, `cognition-debug`, `recover`), repo has skills not in local (`critic`, `day-close-audit`). The relationship and maintenance model is unclear, and it will be discussed at work on Friday.

**Shape:** Inventory both locations, diff them, surface the discrepancies (which skills are stale, which are duplicates, which is truly canonical). Document findings + recommend next action (one-way sync direction, or deliberate split-location model).

**Affected files:** `~/.claude/skills/` (user config, outside repo), `skills/` (repo root), memory/feedback_skills_in_repo.md (the canonical rule), `.claude/skills/settings` or Claude Code config.
**Design rules:** none apply (audit-only, no code changes).
**Scope boundary:** IN — inventory + diff, surface findings, document discrepancies. OUT — actually migrate/delete/sync skills (that's a follow-up ticket if needed).
**Test plan:** no tests because: this is an observation ticket.
**Completion criteria:** Inventory of both locations (skill names + last-modified), diff output showing which exist only in each location, documented recommendation for canonical flow before the Friday discussion.

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)
[hard_block] ⛔ NO SQLITE. EVER. POSTGRES OR FLAT-FILE ONLY. See banner at top of this file. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] No TheIgors imports. UnseenUniversity must be portable without TheIgors present. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] datacenter_logs/<device>/<subsystem>/ is the log hierarchy. Never write to a flat — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] PATTERN-001: BaseDevice / BaseShim Lifecycle: `rollback()` must be idempotent — safe to call even if — applies: tags: pattern, pattern-001 (source: docs/design_patterns_inventory.md#PATTERN-001: BaseDevice / BaseShim Lifecycle)
[error] PATTERN-004: Flat-File Registry (Atomic Write): The skeleton must never depend on Postgres — skeleto — applies: tags: pattern, pattern-004 (source: docs/design_patterns_inventory.md#PATTERN-004: Flat-File Registry (Atomic Write))
…and 37 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set

**Known-stale (confirmed):** `ADCHelp` (local-only) was REPLACED by `/workflow` — delete candidate. Use as the worked example of the audit's output: local-only skills are likely superseded/stale, not missing-from-repo.

**Recommendation written:** docs/skills_harmony_recommendation_20260622.md — full bucket analysis (60 local vs 49 repo; 19 drifted, 6 of them LOCAL-newer = blind-sync regression risk; 2 deletes, ~6 promotions, 1 sync run). Read before Friday.

**Captured as decision D-skills-two-products-2026-06-23** (2026-06-23): two-products split (uu CLI + single-source workflow skills). 6 impl tickets + consequence filed; audit-proportionality deferred to a dedicated discussion. This ticket is the umbrella.
